text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The legitimate esentutl.exe utility is being used with Volume Shadow Copy Service (VSS) to access and potentially copy or defragment the Security Account Manager (SAM) database to a non-standard location (C:\\ProgramData\\SAM). Additionally, the process connects to the \\lsass named pipe, which is a strong indicator of credential access attempts.",
  "indicators": [
    "esentutl.exe",
    "SAM database access",
    "VSS usage",
    "credential dumping",
    "pipe_connect to \\lsass"
  ]
}
